title: Sweet Smoked Venezuelan Paprika Bake
description: A fluffy, earthy Venezuelan dish perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring sweet smoked paprika for a subtle smokiness and low-calorie profile.

ingredients.name: sweet smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, smoked paprika for authentic flavor

instructions: In a bowl, mix 1/2 cup flour with 2 tablespoons sweet smoked paprika until evenly combined.
Add 1/4 cup water and stir until a soft dough forms.
Shape dough into a ball, flatten into a 1-inch thick circle on a baking sheet.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until golden and slightly crispy.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
